name: @ever-works/secret-store-azure-kv-plugin
description: Azure Key Vault SecretStoreResolver plugin for Ever Works — resolves azure-kv:<vaultName>/<secretName> pointers via the Azure Key Vault REST API.

plugin.name: Azure Key Vault Secret Store
plugin.description: Resolves azure-kv:<vaultName>/<secretName> pointers via the Azure Key Vault REST API. Uses a pre-fetched bearer token from AZURE_KV_TOKEN env var (operators provision via Managed Identity, az cli, or sidecar token-refresher).

envVars.name: AZURE_KV_TOKEN
envVars.description: Azure AD bearer token (scope https://vault.azure.net/.default). Operators refresh out-of-band via Managed Identity, az cli, or sidecar.
